title: dondia suffrutescens
intro: Dondia suffrutescens, also known as Dondia, is a tropical plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been found to be beneficial in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Dondia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat digestive issues, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Dondia can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in some cultures as a poultice or topical application to treat skin conditions and wounds.
